benchmark.hero.title: Vorea Studio vs the competition: complete 3D tools comparison
benchmark.hero.subtitle: We analyze the top 3D design platforms so you can choose the best option for your profile.
benchmark.intro.p1: Choosing the right 3D design tool can make the difference between a successful project and wasted hours. In this analysis, we compare Vorea Studio against TinkerCAD, OpenSCAD, Thingiverse Customizer, and OnShape across the categories that matter most: accessibility, technical capabilities, community, and pricing.
benchmark.intro.p2: Vorea Studio is the first platform that combines parametric SCAD modeling, AI-powered model generation, and multi-format export — all from the browser with no installation required.
benchmark.table.title: Feature comparison table
benchmark.vs.tinkercad.title: Vorea Studio vs TinkerCAD
benchmark.vs.tinkercad.p1: TinkerCAD is ideal for absolute beginners thanks to its drag-and-drop interface. However, it lacks parametric modeling, AI generation, and advanced export. Every model is manual and cannot be modified with parameters.
benchmark.vs.tinkercad.p2: Vorea Studio offers everything TinkerCAD has (free, in the browser) and adds: AI 3D generation, editable SCAD code, parametric sliders, direct publishing to MakerWorld, and advanced tools like relief and G-Code.
benchmark.vs.openscad.title: Vorea Studio vs OpenSCAD
benchmark.vs.openscad.p1: OpenSCAD is the reference in parametric SCAD modeling, but requires local installation and has no visual interface for users without programming experience. It doesn't include AI, community, or modern format export.
benchmark.vs.openscad.p2: Vorea Studio brings the SCAD ecosystem to the browser with real-time rendering, generative AI, and an integrated community. It's compatible with OpenSCAD code but adds productivity with sliders, templates, and export tools.
benchmark.vs.thingiverse.title: Vorea Studio vs Thingiverse Customizer
benchmark.vs.thingiverse.p1: Thingiverse's Customizer allows adjusting parameters of existing SCAD models, but the editor is limited to what the original creator defined. There's no AI, multi-export, or advanced tools.
benchmark.vs.thingiverse.p2: Vorea Studio is a Customizer with superpowers: full SCAD editor, AI generation, relief/lithophanes, G-Code preview, and direct publishing. Plus, every model created is fully editable and exportable.
benchmark.vs.onshape.title: Vorea Studio vs OnShape
benchmark.vs.onshape.p1: OnShape is a full professional CAD (SolidWorks-like) aimed at engineering and manufacturing. It's powerful but complex, expensive, and has no AI generation or maker community.
benchmark.vs.onshape.p2: Vorea Studio doesn't replace OnShape for complex mechanical engineering, but it's superior for rapid prototyping, education, makers, and creators who need printable 3D models without a steep learning curve.

privacy.intro: At Vorea Studio (voreastudio.com), your privacy is fundamental. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.s1.provided1: Name, email and photo when you register (Google OAuth)
privacy.s1.auto3: Pages visited and time of use
privacy.s1.auto4: Technical cookies necessary for the service
privacy.s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
privacy.s2.item1Desc: authentication, saving your models, processing memberships
privacy.s2.item3Desc: showing your public profile, model attributions, rewards system
privacy.s3.title: 3. Data Sharing
privacy.s3.intro: We do not sell your personal data.
privacy.s3.introDesc: We only share information in these cases:
privacy.s3.item1Desc: username, avatar and published models are visible to other users
privacy.s4.title: 4. Data Security
privacy.s4.body: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS), encrypted API key storage (AES-256-GCM), and authentication via Google OAuth 2.0 with signed JWT tokens.
privacy.s4.disclaimer: While we take all reasonable precautions, no system is 100% secure. We recommend using strong passwords and not sharing your credentials.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Cookies
privacy.s5.intro: We use strictly necessary cookies for:
privacy.s5.noThirdParty: We do not use third-party cookies for advertising. We may use anonymous analytics cookies to improve the service.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Your Rights
privacy.s6.accessDesc: request a copy of your personal data
privacy.s6.rectificationDesc: correct inaccurate data from your profile
privacy.s6.deletionDesc: request the deletion of your account and data
privacy.s6.portabilityDesc: export your models in standard formats
privacy.s6.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at hola@voreastudio.com
privacy.s7.title: 7. Minors
privacy.s7.body: Vorea Studio is not aimed at children under 13 years of age. We do not intentionally collect data from minors. If we discover that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it immediately.
privacy.s8.title: 8. Contact
privacy.s8.body: For privacy inquiries, you can contact us at hola@voreastudio.com or through our contact page.
terms.s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.s1.body1: By accessing and using Vorea Studio (voreastudio.com), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use the platform.
terms.s1.body2: Vorea Studio reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately after publication on the site.
terms.s2.title: 2. Service Description
terms.s2.intro: Vorea Studio is a professional 3D parametric design platform that allows users to create, edit, export and share 3D models. The platform includes:
terms.s2.item2: Parametric, organic and relief design tools
terms.s2.item4: Export in STL, 3MF and GCode formats
terms.s3.title: 3. User Accounts
terms.s3.intro: To access advanced features, you need to create an account. By doing so, you commit to:
terms.s3.item2: Maintaining the security of your password and account
terms.s3.item3: Not sharing access credentials with third parties
terms.s3.disclaimer: Vorea Studio reserves the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
terms.s4.platformDesc: All software, design, code and content of Vorea Studio is the property of Vorea Studio (voreastudio.com), founded by Martín Darío Daguerre.
terms.s4.userDesc: You retain ownership of the models you create. By publishing to the Community, you grant a license under the terms of Creative Commons BY-SA 4.0:
terms.s4.byDesc: Others must give credit to the original author
terms.s4.saDesc: Derivative works must maintain the same license
terms.s4.forksDesc: By forking a model, you agree to maintain attribution to the original creator permanently and visibly.
terms.s5.title: 5. Prohibited Conduct
terms.s5.item1: Publishing offensive, illegal content or content that infringes third-party rights
terms.s5.item2: Attempting to access systems or data without authorization
terms.s5.item3: Using the platform to distribute malware or spam
terms.s5.item4: Fraudulently manipulating the rewards or points system
terms.s5.item5: Reselling access to the platform without authorization
terms.s6.title: 6. Memberships and Payments
terms.s6.body: Paid memberships (STUDIO PRO, ENTERPRISE) are billed according to the selected period. Cancellations take effect at the end of the billing period. Partial refunds for unused periods are not offered, unless required by local law.
terms.s7.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
terms.s7.body: Vorea Studio is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or the complete absence of errors. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Vorea Studio shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the platform.
terms.s8.title: 8. Jurisdiction
terms.s8.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Oriental Republic of Uruguay. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of the city of Montevideo.

organic.title: Organic Deformation
organic.subtitle: Generate parametric organic patterns: Voronoi, wavy reliefs and geometric wraps. Adjust the parameters and send them to the Editor as compilable SCAD code.
organic.labSubtitle: Adjust parameters, preview the pattern and send to the Editor
organic.modesSubtitle: Each mode generates parametric SCAD code that you can compile and export.
organic.featureDesc0: Organic cells with density, depth, and randomness control. Generates cylindrical cuts distributed over the surface.
organic.featureDesc1: Surface with parametric sinusoidal undulations. Control of intensity, frequency, and relief smoothing.
organic.featureDesc2: Polygonal shapes with wrapping cut patterns. Linear extrude with twist and repetitive cuts.
organic.authMessage: Sign in to send an organic deformation to the editor.

benchmark.swot.title: Vorea Studio SWOT Analysis
benchmark.swot.subtitle: A transparent view of where we are, where we’re headed, and what challenges we face.
benchmark.swot.strengths.title: Strengths
benchmark.swot.strengths.s1: Web-based parametric editor with native SCAD — unique in its segment
benchmark.swot.strengths.s2: Generative AI pipeline (Prompt → SCAD) — real differentiator
benchmark.swot.strengths.s5: Modern stack (Vite + Three.js + Node) with no desktop dependency
benchmark.swot.opportunities.title: Opportunities
benchmark.swot.opportunities.o1: Thingiverse Customizer in decline — audience available
benchmark.swot.opportunities.o2: MakerWorld Customizer only accepts SCAD — Vorea generates compatible SCAD
benchmark.swot.opportunities.o4: Generative AI as a massive acquisition hook
benchmark.swot.opportunities.o5: STEM education as an entry channel
benchmark.swot.weaknesses.title: Weaknesses
benchmark.swot.threats.title: Threats
benchmark.swot.threats.t1: Autodesk/Bambu Lab could improve free web tools
benchmark.swot.threats.t2: AI-powered CAD from big players (Fusion AI, Onshape with PTC)
benchmark.swot.threats.t3: Dependency on external APIs (MakerWorld, PayPal, Google AI)

benchmark.roadmap.q4.desc: Partnerships with manufacturers, white-label SCAD pipeline, analytics dashboard for creators

Dependency on external APIs (MakerWorld, PayPal, Google AI)
benchmark.bMakerWorldWhy: Unites catalog, community, print profiles, and reputation.
benchmark.bMakerWorldReplicate: Collections, community per asset, rich tags, successful print proofs.
benchmark.bPrintablesWhy: Highly active community, badges, clubs, and contests.
benchmark.bPrintablesReplicate: Thematic clubs, contests, collections, activity-based reputation.
benchmark.bThangsWhy: Stands out for 3D-native search and versioning focus.
benchmark.bThangsReplicate: Semantic search, versions, attachments, technical metadata.
benchmark.bThingiverseWhy: Historical reference for remixing, customizer, and volume.
benchmark.bThingiverseAvoid: Legacy UX, heavy and outdated navigation.
benchmark.bMyMiniFactoryWhy: Combines store, community, and printable file trust.
benchmark.bMyMiniFactoryAvoid: Extremely strict gatekeeping stopping fast publishing.
benchmark.bCultsWhy: Mixes marketplace with creator identity and social activity.
benchmark.bCultsReplicate: Author profiles, followers, likes, downloads, badges.
benchmark.bCultsAvoid: Marketplace-first approach without a real community feel.
benchmark.bPonokoWhy: Unites on-demand manufacturing with files and guides.
benchmark.bPonokoAvoid: Complex quoting flows that scare early creators.
benchmark.bDesignBundlesWhy: Strong commercial catalog for ready-to-cut files.
benchmark.bDesignBundlesAvoid: Excessive commercial noise and generic supply.
benchmark.bCreativeWhy: Huge library + subscription model for crafts/laser.
benchmark.bCreativeAvoid: Poor discovery squeezed into endless homogeneous offers.
benchmark.bNewsReplicate1: Curated editorial, fast reading, original sources linked.
benchmark.bNewsAvoid1: Copy-pasting full articles without adding value.
